title: Implementation Binding
description: A prose specification of how a control is satisfied in a specific technology context. Bridges the abstract control and the concrete policy check. Lives in 06-bindings/. Bindings are specifications, not code.

control_id.description: Platform control ID from 03-catalogs/. The control this binding implements.

specification.description: Prose description of what observable artifact or condition must exist to satisfy the control in this context. This is the authoritative specification that policy code implements.

observable_artifact.description: Specific, machine-locatable artifact or configuration that can be checked. Used by policy authors to know exactly where to look.

policy_check_ids.description: Policy check IDs from 07-policies/ that verify this binding. May reference planned IDs before policies are written.

status.description: active: in use; deprecated: replaced by a newer binding.

notes.description: Clarifying notes or known edge cases.
